PowerShell($pdf = "c:\\Users\\night\\Documents\\Brands\\fotograph\\docs\\AI Product Photo SaaS_ Zero-to-Revenue Playbook for Dutch E-Commerce.pdf"; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression; $bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\($pdf\); $text = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString\($bytes\) -replace '[^\\x20-\\x7E\\r\\n]', ' ' -replace ' {3,}', '  '; $text | Select-String -Pattern '[A-Za-z]{4,}' -AllMatches | ForEach-Object { $_.Line } | Where-Object { $_.Trim\(\).Length -gt 20 } | Select-Object -First 200)
